title: 16. Shandong College of Traditional Chinese Medicine 1979 Zhen
text:
Jiu Jia Yi Jing
[The ABC o f Acupuncture]. People’s
Health Publishing House, Beijing. The ABC o f Acupuncture was
written by Huang Fu Mi and first published ad282.
17. 1981 Huang Di Nei JingTai Su З Ш Й Й Л Ж  [An Elucidation
